style.medium: photorealistic 3d render, editorial minimal still-life, shallow depth of field

palette.accent: #9cba90 dusted restrained phosphor green - muted, NOT neon, soft glow only

style.lighting: low-key cinematic, single soft key light, soft volumetric haze, deep shadows
style.composition: one clear subject, vast empty dark negative space, generous margins
style.forbidden: no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no brand marks, no people, no faces, no clutter

images.scene: three glowing green blocks of increasing height forming a ranked podium on dark ground, the tallest faintly crowned, vast negative space
a steep dark staircase of three landings lit progressively brighter green, ascending into darkness
a single green-lit signpost with diverging paths on dark ground, one path glowing brighter, minimal
